app.tagline: Your news, your papers, your schedule — one page.
app.error: Something went wrong loading this section.
app.notConfigured: This section isn't set up yet.
app.notConfiguredHint: Add the required secrets in your repository settings, then wait for the next update. See the setup guide.
app.noscript: Relevance needs JavaScript to render your dashboard. 及君需要启用 JavaScript 才能显示。

onboarding.title: Almost there — one build away
onboarding.body: This dashboard hasn't produced its first data snapshot yet. If you just deployed, do the following:
onboarding.step1: Enable GitHub Actions for your repository (Actions tab → enable workflows).
onboarding.step2: Run the “Update Relevance” workflow once (Actions → Update Relevance → Run workflow), or wait for the schedule.
onboarding.step3: Enable GitHub Pages (Settings → Pages → deploy from branch, main / root).
onboarding.step4: Open the “Set up my Relevance” issue in your repository to choose sources, theme, language, and privacy.

login.title: Private mode
login.prompt: Enter your passphrase to unlock private sections and notes.
login.rememberNote: Stores the derived key (not your passphrase) in this browser. Skip this on shared computers.
login.gateBody: All content is encrypted. Enter the passphrase to read.
login.noCrypto: Private mode isn't configured. Set the NEWSDASH_PASSPHRASE secret to enable private sections and notes.

today.noDue: Nothing due in the next 7 days.

reader.unavailableBody: This item does not include embedded full text in the current feed snapshot.
reader.staleBody: This article may have rolled out of the latest generated data. Open the original source instead.

fav.title: Favorites
fav.empty: No favorites yet. Click the ☆ on any item to save it here.
fav.lockedHint: Unlock private mode to see your favorites.

clippings.title: Clippings
clippings.empty: No highlights, excerpts, or notes yet. Select text in any item to start.
clippings.lockedHint: Unlock private mode to see your clippings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiSummaryConfigured: Configured — an AI daily brief and Today's Image may appear on the Today page.
settings.aiSummaryNotConfigured: Not configured. The dashboard owner can add an LLM_API_KEY secret to enable an AI daily brief and Today's Image.
settings.aboutBody: Relevance — a serverless, self-hosted news · schedule · research dashboard. Data updates via GitHub Actions; private sections are AES-256 encrypted and decrypted only in your browser.
